title: recall query spec
description: Optional spec file for `hpc-mapreduce recall`. The same arguments are exposed as CLI flags (--root, --task-kind, --operator, --since, --limit, --include-runtime, --include-generator-stats) and the operator picks one path. The flag form is more convenient for shell pipelines; the spec form is more convenient when the calling agent already has a structured filter to pass. When `root` is omitted (in either form), recall falls back to ~/.claude-hpc/config.json:experiment_roots — both empty raises spec_invalid.

root.description: Filesystem directory to walk (recursively) for interview.json files. Optional; when absent, ~/.claude-hpc/config.json:experiment_roots is consulted.

since.description: Only return campaigns with _materialized.at >= this ISO-8601 timestamp.

limit.description: Cap on results returned. The total match count (pre-truncation) is reported via data.total_matching.

include_runtime.description: Tier 2 rollup: walks each matched campaign's .hpc/runtimes/*.json and aggregates elapsed_sec + failure rate. Adds data.rollup.runtime_rollup.

include_generator_stats.description: Tier 3 rollup: buckets matched campaigns by task_generator.kind and reports observed parameter envelopes. Adds data.rollup.generator_rollup.
